description: A tenant submits a maintenance request for a leaking faucet.

nodes.task_description: Receive the maintenance request from the tenant via the online portal.

expected_outcome.value: A new work order is created in the system.

nodes.task_description: Assess the urgency of the request and assign it to a qualified plumber from the vendor list.

expected_outcome.value: The work order is assigned to the appropriate vendor.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate a service appointment time between the tenant and the plumber.

expected_outcome.value: A service appointment is successfully scheduled.
